form.formComment: Racing well recently. Last start sat on speed throughout when 3rd of 9 at Tauranga on March 14 over 1400m, on a wet track; 2 len behind Morning Cocoa with 58.5kg at $1.90. Before that 2nd of 12 at Pukekohe on February 25 over 1200m, on a slow track; 0.5 len behind Sweet Smile with 56.5kg at $5. Rates highly. Fleet-footed type who is expected to take some catching.
